required_writes.description: Write PRE_SCALE=0x1E at register 0xFE (200 Hz with 25 MHz internal oscillator). Required to enable PWM; PRE_SCALE only writable when SLEEP=1.
Write MODE1=0x21 at register 0x00 (AI=1 auto-increment, SLEEP=0 wake, ALLCALL=1). Wakes the device from sleep after setting PRE_SCALE.
